title: Zybit
tag: Founding now · live in 3 dental practices
blurb: Voice AI that charts for dentists. Zybit listens while you work and writes findings into Open Dental — on the right tooth, in your own codes, exactly as you said them.

title: RWA Analyzer
blurb: Agent-first backing-verification for tokenized real-world assets, over MCP, CLI, and HTTP. Checks whether a token's real-world backing actually holds up instead of rubber-stamping it.

title: Kite Credit
blurb: A persistent, cross-border credit score fusing on-chain Solana activity, GitHub history, and ZK-verified bank statements (Reclaim), with plain-English explanations from Gemini 2.0.

title: CommitMint
blurb: A Solana commitment-pool platform for accountability and habit-building on Anchor smart contracts. Built the commitment-escrow contracts and backend.

title: ComputeSwarm
blurb: A decentralized GPU compute marketplace matching idle GPUs with demand through trustless x402/USDC micropayments on Base, with Docker-sandboxed execution.

title: GraphRAG Dodd-Frank
blurb: A knowledge-graph RAG system over the 800-page Dodd-Frank Act. Extracts entities and relationships, then does hybrid graph + vector retrieval to answer questions a flat vector store misses.

title: Texas Hold'em (OCaml)
blurb: Networked multiplayer Texas Hold'em built from scratch in OCaml — a TCP server, terminal clients with ASCII-rendered cards, a hand evaluator, and an interactive rulebook.
